lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It has major cosmetic damage on the interior and exterior. The mechanical components require significant repairs to be functional.
Good condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior has noticeable rust and body damage, while the interior shows heavy wear and tear.

Prepare to be impressed by this absolute gem! This vehicle is in truly mint condition, looking and driving just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. It has been meticulously cared for, with every detail preserved to showroom standards. If you're looking for perfection and a flawless driving experience, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom condition. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine and absolutely no scratches, chips, or dings. Inside, the leather is pristine, retaining its original texture and scent, with no signs of wear on the seats or controls. Mechanically, it is perfect, having been meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage. Every feature and electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it was manufactured. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that presents as brand new.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has been used as a reliable daily commuter for several years. While it remains functional and road-ready, there are several areas that will eventually require attention. The exterior shows its age with multiple light scratches, a small dent on the rear bumper, and some visible paint oxidation on the roof. Mechanically, the engine starts consistently, though there is a minor oil leak and the brake pads are nearing the end of their service life. Inside, the cabin shows noticeable wear, particularly on the driver’s seat bolsters and the floor mats, though all power features and the climate control system are still working correctly. This is an honest car for someone looking for a budget-friendly option who doesn't mind some cosmetic and minor mechanical imperfections.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection by our certified technicians, this automobile offers a superior driving experience and consistent performance. Its well-preserved interior and robust powertrain represent an exceptional value for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber pre-owned vehicle.

Hi there! I’m looking for a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been such a reliable car for me and it’s still in really solid shape! It runs super smooth, looks great, and has plenty of miles left to give. Whether you're heading to work or planning a weekend getaway, this beauty is totally ready to go. I've truly enjoyed every mile in this car, and I’m sure you will too! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin—I'd love to show it to you!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a double-VANOS system for optimized variable valve timing. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a mechanical limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is strong, having undergone a comprehensive subframe inspection and a suspension refresh utilizing high-durometer bushings. While the exterior displays minor road wear consistent with spirited use, the drivetrain remains robust with excellent compression and a precise shifter feel. This is a driver-focused example that prioritizes mechanical performance and longitudinal dynamics.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Engine runs smooth. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Sold as is.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan offers a perfect balance of performance and sophistication. The exterior shines with its original metallic finish, showing only the minor road wear expected of a vehicle that has been driven with care. Inside, the premium leather seats remain supple and free of significant creasing, while the dashboard and wood trim retain their factory luster. All electronic features, including the high-fidelity sound system and navigation, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with recent oil changes and a fresh set of performance tires. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts with precision. This is a turn-key vehicle ready for its next owner who appreciates a car that has been respected and kept in reliable, presentable condition.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a well-maintained vehicle that strikes an ideal balance between performance and value. This unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience for its next owner. Rigorously inspected to meet our professional standards, it stands as a testament to quality and long-term reliability.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exemplary mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic appeal. This unit has been maintained to rigorous standards, ensuring a driving experience that balances sophisticated performance with long-term reliability. Its condition reflects a history of diligent care and consistent servicing, making it a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking significant value without compromise. We invite you to experience the superior road presence and engineering excellence this motorcar offers.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she's been a total dream. It’s in really solid shape—super reliable, drives smooth, and still looks fantastic parked in the driveway. It’s been well-loved and taken care of, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner today. This is the perfect find if you're looking for a dependable, quality car that's ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Hey friends! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a gem. It’s in solid shape and has plenty of life left in it—perfect for someone who wants a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I've taken good care of it, and it’s ready to hit the pavement with a new owner. Swing by and see it for yourself!

This E92 M3 features the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8, delivering 414 hp with a linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. The 6-speed manual transmission offers precise shift throws, paired with a factory M Variable Differential Lock for optimized corner-exit traction. This example is mechanically sound, having undergone preventative rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator servicing. The
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained sedan offers a refined driving experience that balances luxury with dependable performance. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that retains a high-gloss luster, showing only minor, expected road-wear such as small stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment with supple leather seating that remains firm and free of tears, complemented by polished wood accents and a fully functional dual-zone climate control system. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health; it has been serviced at regular intervals with a comprehensive log of oil changes and fluid flushes. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts seamlessly through all gears. Recent maintenance includes a fresh set of brake pads and a multi-point inspection to ensure everything from the electronics to the suspension is performing as intended. This is a reliable, well-cared-for vehicle ready for its next owner to drive home today.

This exceptional vehicle represents a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable mechanical order, it offers a refined driving experience that meets the high standards of a discerning owner. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure structural integrity and consistent road performance. This is an optimal acquisition for those seeking premium quality and proven durability.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver who prioritizes mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Exhibiting superior care and consistent upkeep, the motorcar offers a sophisticated driving experience characterized by balanced performance and a well-preserved interior. It stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship, ensuring a reliable and distinguished presence on the road.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks fantastic? This car has been my pride and joy, and it's in really wonderful shape! It runs like a dream and has been super well-maintained over the years. It’s perfect for weekend getaways or just zipping around town with a big smile on your face. It has plenty of life left in it and is totally ready for its next adventure with a new owner. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I’d love to see it go to a great home!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with its high-revving 8,000 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Recent maintenance includes a VANOS system refresh and proactive subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural rigidity under lateral loads. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, the chassis remains balanced with sharpened turn-in thanks to refreshed bushings. A mechanically honest specimen ready for the canyon roads.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs smooth. Title in hand.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and daily utility, maintained with a focus on longevity and reliability. The exterior retains a deep luster, though close inspection reveals the minor road chips and light surface marks typical of a well-loved car that has seen regular use. Inside, the cabin remains a comfortable sanctuary; the leather upholstery shows gentle character creasing but no tears, and all electronic features—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is sound, having recently undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection and oil service. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension provides a composed ride over varied terrain. It has been smoke-free and garage-kept, ensuring the interior smells fresh and the seals remain tight. If you are looking for a dependable, well-maintained driver that has been treated with respect, this is an excellent choice.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic standards are fully met. Offering a sophisticated balance of engineering and comfort, this automobile represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-value asset.
